name: Salt Bread
recipeIngredient: Peel and slice one medium-sized potato
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the peeled and sliced potato, sugar, salt, and corn meal to a large bowl filled with boiling water. Stir well and let stand in a warm place overnight until light.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together half a teaspoon of baking soda and enough flour to make a stiff batter (about 2 and a half cups).
3. Add the hot water, sugar, salt, and one-third cup of lard to the flour mixture. Mix well using about nine cups of flour until a medium stiff dough forms.
4. Gradually add the light batter into the flour mixture, kneading well.
5. Shape the dough into loaves and place in greased baking pans.
6. Bake in a moderately hot oven (350-400°F) for approximately 25 minutes.
Note: Moderate oven is 350 - 400 F.
